title: Steamy Muscovado Medley
description: A fresh, tender Italian medley featuring muscovado sugar for a unique meal-prep dish that's both Jain-friendly and suitable for those who prefer low-sodium options.
instructions: Place all ingredients in a pan over medium heat.
Add olive oil to the pan, then add herbs and garlic. Sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add muscovado sugar and tomato sauce. Stir well and let cook for an additional minute or two.
Slice zucchini into thin rounds and red bell pepper in half circles. Add them to the pan.
Cover the pan with a lid, reduce heat to low, and steam until vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper just before serving.
